data.name: My Giant Sexy Sensei Bullies Me 5
data.detailed_description:
After cumming on Yuna, you, she, and Kirita decide to go to your university dorm in order to clean up, and Yuna's excited to punish you in the privacy of your dorm room for cumming on her without her permission. Your bond with Kirita grows as Yuna keeps mercilessly tormenting you and as she watches the two of you enjoy your BDSM session together.

Experience what it's like to be bullied by a tall, tanned, big-breasted, gleeful, upbeat, sadistic sensei while your equally sexy university friend watches with excitement.

  • ~1.7K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 16 Unique character images

  • 19 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
